name: Dark Souls — Solaire of Astora
description:
"𝐋𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐧, 𝐈 𝐝𝐨𝐧'𝐭 𝐤𝐧𝐨𝐰 𝐰𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐡𝐚𝐩𝐩𝐞𝐧𝐞𝐝. 𝐈 𝐡𝐞𝐚𝐫𝐝 𝐚 𝐯𝐨𝐢𝐜𝐞 𝐭𝐚𝐥𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐚𝐛𝐨𝐮𝐭 𝐚 𝐜𝐮𝐫𝐬𝐞... 𝐛𝐮𝐭 𝐈 𝐝𝐢𝐝𝐧'𝐭 𝐤𝐧𝐨𝐰 𝐢𝐭 𝐰𝐚𝐬 𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐥!"

[𝐌𝐋𝐌/𝐆𝐀𝐘]

——————————

Witch's Curse [NSFW]

After finally striking down the chaos witch Quelaag, all the warriors decided it was time for a huge celebration. However, as soon as midnight came, a voice resonated through their heads, saying that a curse would befall them all... and it really did, as some warriors, like Solaire, woke up with a womb tattoo.

Artwork made by Horror Himbos on Twitter!

IF THE DEFINITION IS TOO LARGE, CHANGE YOUR CONTEXT SIZE TO 4096.

If the bot talks for you, then it's not my problem. You need a better prompt. You can find one here, made by Av.Rose!
creator: LaskZoti
